bugs.title: Dashboard downgrades integration audit findings to other
bugs.description: The ShipGuard output schema includes the canonical category integration, but the client-side validCats list omits it and the category map does not normalize cross-zone aliases. A valid integration finding is rewritten to other in the dashboard, which hides cross-zone/API contract issues from the intended category view.

bugs.title: Recorder strips base URLs without path boundary check
bugs.description: stripBase uses startsWith on the raw base URL. With baseUrl http://example.test/app and recorded URL http://example.test/application, it emits {base_url}lication instead of leaving the absolute URL or treating it as outside the base path. This can generate unreplayable manifests for apps served below a subpath.

bugs.title: Review server handles favicon GET but not HEAD
bugs.description: The local review server special-cases only GET /favicon.ico. Browser and diagnostic clients may send HEAD /favicon.ico; that falls through to static file serving and returns 404 when no favicon file exists. This creates avoidable noise in dashboard health checks.

bugs.title: Dashboard lightbox image lacks explicit dimensions
bugs.description: The static lightbox image element has no width or height attributes, and dynamically created thumbnails also rely on CSS only. The thumbnail grid has an aspect-ratio guard, but the lightbox can still shift while large screenshots load; the HTML/CSS/JS checklist flags images without explicit dimensions as a CLS risk.
